summary: A raw Fox News live broadcast segment of a reporter doing on-the-ground hits from Miami International Airport as the first U.S.-Venezuela commercial flight in seven years resumes. Frames show the live reporter, an interviewee, and Fox News chyrons/FOX NEWS ALERT banners with a continuous talking news transcript. Lightly clipped TV news, not a music-driven produced spectacle.
notable_text: Fox News chyrons: 'U.S.-VENEZUELA FLIGHTS RESUME AFTER 7-YEAR HIATUS', 'SOON: 1ST U.S.-VENEZUELA DIRECT FLIGHT SINCE 2019', 'FOX NEWS ALERT'
